description: Agent-first Google Analytics 4 CLI with typed Data/Admin/Funnel API coverage and one-call reports for channels, pages, funnels, anomalies, revenue, and health.

novel_features.name: Health/Doctor
novel_features.description: health/doctor distinguishes token/API errors from property-level GA4 access grant failures

novel_features.name: Channels,
novel_features.description: channels, sources, top-pages, revenue produce curated acquisition/ecommerce tables

novel_features.name: Compare
novel_features.description: compare calculates period-over-period deltas and percentage changes in one call

novel_features.name: Whats-Changed
novel_features.description: whats-changed scans movers across channels, source/medium, and landing pages

novel_features.name: Funnel
novel_features.description: funnel wraps v1alpha runFunnelReport for named event sequences

novel_features.name: Agent-Context
novel_features.description: agent-context emits structured tool metadata for agents

catalog_description: Agent-first Google Analytics 4 CLI with typed Data/Admin/Funnel API coverage and one-call reports for channels, pages, funnels, anomalies, revenue, and health.
